base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_ring_blue_red — a pickup_item (currency) from 1986 legend of zelda. Ring (blue + red variants) — reduces damage taken by half (blue) or quarter (red). Tunic palette changes from green when equipped. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ring (blue + red variants) — reduces damage taken by half (blue) or quarter (red). Tunic palette changes from green when equipped
